name: nextcloud-talk
description: Nextcloud Talk connector — bridges Nextcloud Talk chat messages to Sentient brain via Redis

config_fields.name: password
config_fields.description: Nextcloud bot user account password or app token

config_fields.name: bot_aliases
config_fields.description: Alternative names the bot responds to

config_fields.name: whitelisted_users
config_fields.description: Nextcloud user IDs allowed to interact

config_fields.name: whitelisted_groups
config_fields.description: Talk room tokens to process messages from
